Class CPUCollisionProvider

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.natural.physics.classical.mechanics.collision.providers.CPUCollisionProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
AlgorithmProvider, Backend, CollisionProvider
@AutoService(CollisionProvider.class) public class CPUCollisionProvider extends Object implements CollisionProvider
CPU-based implementation of CollisionProvider.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    detectSphereCollisions(double[] positions, double[] radii, int n, int[] collisions)
    Performs collision detection between spheres.
    String
    getDescription()
    Returns a description of the backend.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier for this backend (e.g., "javafx", "jmol", "cuda").
    String
    getName()
    Returns the human-readable name of the provider.
    int
    getPriority()
    Returns the execution priority (higher is better).
    void
    resolveCollisions(double[] positions, double[] velocities, double[] masses, int n, int[] collisions, int numCollisions)
    Resolves collisions by updating velocities.

  • Method Details

    • detectSphereCollisions

      public int detectSphereCollisions(double[] positions, double[] radii, int n, int[] collisions)
      Description copied from interface: CollisionProvider
      Performs collision detection between spheres.
      Specified by:
      detectSphereCollisions in interface CollisionProvider
      Parameters:
      positions - Flattened array [x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, ...]
      radii - Array of radii [r0, r1, ...]
      n - Number of spheres
      collisions - Output array for collision pairs [idA, idB, ...]
      Returns:
      Number of collisions found

    • resolveCollisions

      public void resolveCollisions(double[] positions, double[] velocities, double[] masses, int n, int[] collisions, int numCollisions)
      Description copied from interface: CollisionProvider
      Resolves collisions by updating velocities.
      Specified by:
      resolveCollisions in interface CollisionProvider
      Parameters:
      positions - Positions array
      velocities - Velocities array
      masses - Masses array
      n - Number of spheres
      collisions - Collisions array
      numCollisions - Number of collision pairs
